name: Snowbound Circlet of Protection
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Survivor's Reflexes', DB stores 'Survivor's Avoidance'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Avoidance
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain up to 14,475 Awareness based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0 Awareness.

name: Snowbound Coil of Wrath
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Assassin's Bloodbath', DB stores 'Assassin's Growth'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Assassin's Growth
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you critically strike an enemy with your Powers, you gain 14,475 Critical Severity for 10s. (15 second cooldown)

name: Snowbound Ring of Initiative
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Explosive Force', DB stores 'Explosive Volley'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Explosive Volley
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you damage an enemy with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 100 magnitude damage in a 20 radius around your target. (5 second cooldown)

name: Ancient Scalebreaker's Gloves
issues: Equip bonus distance: screenshot says 'no teammates within 30\' of you' but DB description says 'within 10\' of you'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Herald's Cunning
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you have teammates within 10' of you, your Stamina Regeneration and Control Resistance is increased by 5%.

name: Astral Raider's Wristguards
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Scaled Furor' but DB stores 'Scaled Power'
Equip bonus damage cap: screenshot shows 'up to 20% bonus Damage' but DB stores 'up to 70% bonus Damage'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Scaled Power
dbEquipBonuses.description: Grants up to 70% bonus Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

name: Cuirass of the Scarlet Arcanum
issues: Equip bonus name: DB has 'Focused Frenzy', screenshot reads 'Focused Burst' (confirmed across all three screenshots for this item)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Frenzy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, for the next 30 seconds your next Encounter Power deals +75% more Damage.

name: Hauberk of the Crimson Gale
issues: Equip bonus 'Lethal Focus': screenshot says '+3% Power and +4% Accuracy' vs DB '+3% Hit Points and +4% Accuracy'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Lethal Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain +3% Hit Points and +4% Accuracy for 7 seconds (5 second cooldown).

name: Depthcured Cap
issues: Equip bonus description: screenshot shows 'gain 0.8% Combat Advantage' per 5 seconds vs DB '1% Combat Advantage'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Combat Advantage. Max 10 Stacks: 8% Combat Advantage.
